sampleData.note: Dummy data for export preview and PDF/source comparison only. Do not treat these values as imported organization facts.

values.MotionText: the attached policy be approved and added to the society records

exactTemplate.html:
{CorporationName}
                                         (the "Corporation")

 Policy Name:                  {PolicyName}

 Policy Number:                {PolicyNumber}

 Effective Date:               {PolicyEffectiveDate}

 Volunteers and staff will be reimbursed for expenses incurred in conducting the business of the
 Corporation. The Treasurer or Executive Director, prior to the expense being incurred, must
 approve the request for reimbursement. For approved expenses, receipts must accompany
 requests for reimbursement. The expenses for the Executive Director/CEO are reviewed annually
 by the Treasurer.

 Mileage will be reimbursed at the rate of $0.40 per km (or whichever other rate the Board
 determines). This rate is reviewed annually based on reasonable criteria that materially impact
 the determination of a fair reimbursement rate. Meal expenditures incurred on Corporation
 business will be reimbursed, per person, based on the following schedule: breakfast $12.00; lunch
 $17.00; supper $30.00.

 Monitoring:                   This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate}.

 Board Acceptance:             This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors
                               of the Corporation on {EffectiveDate}, as confirmed by
                               {#SoleVotDir}the signature of the sole director of the
                               Corporation below.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}the
                               counterpart signatures of each of the directors of the Corporation
                               below.{/MultiVotDir}

 {#VotingDirectors}


     {SignerTag}
 _________________________________________
 {Director-Name}{/VotingDirectors}


Policy {PolicyNumber} - {PolicyName} - {CorporationName} - {PolicyEffectiveDate}

 Policy Name:                  Expense Reimbursement Policy

 Policy Number:                FIN-002

 Effective Date:               2026-01-01

 Volunteers and staff will be reimbursed for expenses incurred in conducting the business of the
 Corporation. The Treasurer or Executive Director, prior to the expense being incurred, must
 approve the request for reimbursement. For approved expenses, receipts must accompany
 requests for reimbursement. The expenses for the Executive Director/CEO are reviewed annually

 Mileage will be reimbursed at the rate of $0.40 per km (or whichever other rate the Board
 determines). This rate is reviewed annually based on reasonable criteria that materially impact
 the determination of a fair reimbursement rate. Meal expenditures incurred on Corporation
 business will be reimbursed, per person, based on the following schedule: breakfast $12.00; lunch
 $17.00; supper $30.00.

 Monitoring:                   This policy will be reviewed on or around 2027-01-01.

                               of the Corporation on 2026-01-01, as confirmed by
                               the

                               below.

 


     Chair
 _________________________________________
 Avery Chen




     Treasurer
 _________________________________________

 Volunteers and staff will be reimbursed for expenses incurred in conducting the business of the

dummySampleComparison.method: Normalized keyword overlap between extracted source PDF text and the dummy-filled remade template. This flags drift only; it is not a legal-equivalence review.

remadeTemplate.summary: Pre-approval, receipts, mileage, meals, staff and volunteer reimbursements, and executive expense review.

sections.heading: Eligibility
paragraphs: Approved staff, directors, committee members, and volunteers may be reimbursed for reasonable expenses incurred for authorized organizational business.

sections.heading: Approval and Documentation
bullets: Expenses should be approved before they are incurred unless the board has approved another process.
Receipts or equivalent support must be attached to reimbursement requests.
Mileage, meals, travel, and special expenses follow the board-approved rates and limits.
Executive director or CEO expenses are reviewed by the treasurer or another board-designated person.

structuredSummaryTemplate.html:
{PolicyName}

Organization: {CorporationName}

Policy number: {PolicyNumber}

Effective date: {PolicyEffectiveDate}

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Eligibility

Approved staff, directors, committee members, and volunteers may be reimbursed for reasonable expenses incurred for authorized organizational business.

Approval and Documentation

  • Expenses should be approved before they are incurred unless the board has approved another process.
  • Receipts or equivalent support must be attached to reimbursement requests.
  • Mileage, meals, travel, and special expenses follow the board-approved rates and limits.
  • Executive director or CEO expenses are reviewed by the treasurer or another board-designated person.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate} and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of {CorporationName} on {EffectiveDate}.

{#SoleVotDir}Approved by the sole voting director.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.{/MultiVotDir}

{#VotingDirectors}{SignerTag}
_________________________________________
{Director-Name}{/VotingDirectors}
